# Testing Spec (slimmed — cross-cutting only)

Per-FR testing content moved to each FR file's `## Testing` section. This file retains framework, conventions, coverage targets, and shared fixtures.

## Test Framework

Shared test runner configuration and invocation conventions.

## Conventions

What-to-test / what-not-to-test guidance applies uniformly across FRs.

## Coverage Targets

Tier-level targets apply across all FRs.
